name: Blender Action: Open Blend
description: Creates a Blender action to open a .blend file. Chain action nodes via actions_in/actions_out and feed the final list into a Blender Headless node.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]
    blend_path = inputs.get('blend_path') or self.get_parameter('blend_path', '')
    action = {'type': 'open_blend', 'blend_path': blend_path}
    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added open_blend action: {blend_path}')
    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
